response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple domains and languages
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Demonstrated ability to own ambiguous projects and deliver production systems
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems architecture at scale
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership roles mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
